pending.body: finding_summary: Generated milestone bundles can still omit every workstream description and pass contract validation. In `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs:141-149`, generated-mode validation only checks `workstreams[].name` and `workstreams[].beads`; it never requires a non-empty `workstreams[].description`, even though the new prompt explicitly says each workstream must include a description covering theme, sequencing intent, and deferred scope (`src/contexts/workspace_governance/template_catalog.rs:335-350`). Because `src/contexts/requirements_drafting/contracts.rs:372-377` now relies on `validate_generated()` for planner output, a bundle with `description: null` on every workstream will still be accepted and rendered without the rationale/deferred context this bead is supposed to generate. affected_files: `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs`, `src/contexts/requirements_drafting/contracts.rs`, `src/contexts/workspace_governance/template_catalog.rs`. remediation_hint: In generated mode, reject missing or whitespace-only `workstreams[].description` values and add a contract test that proves omitted descriptions fail milestone-bundle evaluation.

finding_summary: The new deferred-items renderer can miss prompt-compliant deferred notes because its keyword matcher does not recognize the wording the prompt now asks for. The prompt tells the planner to mention deferred scope as "follow-up work" or work that is "not part of this milestone" (`src/contexts/workspace_governance/template_catalog.rs:336,350`), but `contains_deferred_note()` in `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs:1016-1030` only matches `defer`, `not included`, `out of scope`, `future work`, `later phase`, `follow-up milestone`, and `intentionally excluded`. A bundle can therefore contain the requested deferred notes while `render_plan_md()` produces no `## Deferred Items` section at all. affected_files: `src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs`, `src/contexts/workspace_governance/template_catalog.rs`. remediation_hint: Expand the detector to include the prompt phrases (at minimum `follow-up work` and `not part of this milestone`) or move deferred scope into structured data instead of inferring it from ad hoc text matching.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 7 -> Plan and Implement
